name: CARTERS INC
summary: Overview We are North Americas largest and most-enduring apparel company exclusively for babies and young children. Our core brands are Carters and OshKosh Bgosh (or OshKosh ), iconic and among the sectors most trusted names. Our exclusive Carters brands, which consist of Child of Mine , Just One You , and Simple Joys , are developed for Walmart, Target, and Amazon.
